title: Daily Moderation Summary - April 28, 2026
body:
Daily Moderation Summary - April 28, 2026

Reviewed 6 reports today:

BANNED (2):
• spam_wave_42 - Phishing links in 6 channels (confirmed spam)
• toxic_runner - Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers

WARNED (1):
• bot_like_user_77 - Suspicious automation behavior (repeated identical replies)

CLOSED WITHOUT ACTION (1):
• core_maintainer - False positive; mass-report from brigading users after legitimate moderation decision

PENDING (2):
• report_003 (trusted_helper) - Medium severity dispute, under review
• report_004 (new_member_17) - Low severity formatting issue, will address via guidance

Community safety remains a priority. Reports are reviewed within 24 hours.
